summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Elara AI virtual assistant app. All backend APIs (16/16) working perfectly including GPT-5.2 integration. Frontend UI fully functional with successful login, 3D avatar, theme switching, persona selection, AI chat, metrics dashboard, and logout flow.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns 200 OK
Admin login with admin@elara.ai / admin123 successful
User registration creates new accounts
JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies working
AI chat integration with GPT-5.2 responding correctly
Neural metrics endpoint returning data
Knowledge base CRUD operations working
Growth log CRUD operations working
User preferences (theme/persona) updates working
Chat history get/clear operations working
Login page renders with email/password fields
Registration page accessible via 'Create one' link
Main dashboard loads with 3D avatar, sidebar, chat interface
Theme switcher works - Midnight Cinematic, Serenity, Cyberpunk, Aurora
Persona selector changes active persona (Professional, Casual, Empathetic, etc.)
Chat input accepts text and sends to API
Chat receives AI responses from GPT-5.2
Neural Metrics radar chart displays in sidebar
Knowledge tab shows knowledge base entries
Voice input button present and accessible
Clear chat functionality working
Logout button works and redirects to login
